title: TNR structured logging event-code and metrics registry

event_codes.name: compat_contract_loaded
event_codes.description: Canonical compat operation contract loaded for evaluation.

event_codes.name: compat_oracle_green
event_codes.description: Node/Bun/franken parity oracle returned a green verdict.

error_codes.name: compat_oracle_divergence
error_codes.description: Parity oracle found an unresolved semantic divergence.

metrics.name: franken_node_compat_operations_total
metrics.description: Compat operations evaluated by the parity oracle.

event_codes.name: effect_receipt_started
event_codes.description: Host-effect receipt construction started.

event_codes.name: effect_receipt_chained
event_codes.description: Effect receipt was appended to the receipt chain.

error_codes.name: effect_receipt_invalid
error_codes.description: Effect receipt failed canonical or chain validation.

metrics.name: franken_node_effect_receipts_total
metrics.description: Effect receipts emitted by host-effect execution.

event_codes.name: cas_put_started
event_codes.description: Content-addressed blob write started.

event_codes.name: cas_integrity_verified
event_codes.description: Content-addressed blob integrity verified on read.

error_codes.name: cas_integrity_mismatch
error_codes.description: Stored bytes did not match the expected content digest.

metrics.name: franken_node_cas_blobs_total
metrics.description: CAS blob operations by operation and verdict.

event_codes.name: replay_bundle_loaded
event_codes.description: Replay bundle was loaded for deterministic replay.

event_codes.name: replay_verdict_emitted
event_codes.description: Replay verifier emitted its final verdict.

error_codes.name: replay_divergence
error_codes.description: Replay diverged from the recorded evidence path.

event_codes.name: flow_label_attached
event_codes.description: Sensitive source label attached to a datum.

event_codes.name: flow_sink_allowed
event_codes.description: Sink flow allowed with matching policy or declassification receipt.

error_codes.name: flow_sink_blocked
error_codes.description: Sink flow failed closed without valid declassification.

metrics.name: franken_node_flow_blocks_total
metrics.description: Information-flow sink blocks by sink and label class.

event_codes.name: sentinel_observation_ingested
event_codes.description: Runtime sentinel ingested a canonical observation.

event_codes.name: sentinel_action_selected
event_codes.description: Sentinel selected an expected-loss-minimizing action.

error_codes.name: sentinel_guardrail_override
error_codes.description: Hard guardrail precedence overrode probabilistic action selection.

metrics.name: franken_node_sentinel_escalations_total
metrics.description: Sentinel escalation actions by selected action.

event_codes.name: conformal_set_emitted
event_codes.description: Conformal risk set emitted from frozen quantiles.

event_codes.name: aci_quantile_updated
event_codes.description: Adaptive conformal quantile updated from realized coverage.

error_codes.name: coverage_under_target
error_codes.description: Empirical coverage fell below the declared target window.

metrics.name: franken_node_conformal_coverage_observations_total
metrics.description: Conformal coverage observations by class and coverage result.

event_codes.name: capability_proof_issued
event_codes.description: Capability proof or receipt issued for an actor.

event_codes.name: capability_proof_verified
event_codes.description: Capability proof verified by the product or SDK.

error_codes.name: capability_proof_rejected
error_codes.description: Capability proof failed scope, epoch, or postcondition validation.

metrics.name: franken_node_capability_proofs_total
metrics.description: Capability proof checks by scope and verdict.

event_codes.name: migration_certificate_started
event_codes.description: Bounded migration certificate generation started.

event_codes.name: migration_certificate_verified
event_codes.description: Migration certificate verified against its declared bound.

error_codes.name: migration_witness_diverged
error_codes.description: Differential witness diverged or exceeded the certificate bound.

metrics.name: franken_node_migration_certificates_total
metrics.description: Migration certificates by rule and verdict.

event_codes.name: mcp_tool_invoked
event_codes.description: MCP tool invocation accepted for dispatch.

event_codes.name: mcp_mutation_receipted
event_codes.description: Mutating MCP tool emitted an agent-action receipt.

error_codes.name: mcp_scope_denied
error_codes.description: MCP mutation denied by audience-token scope.

metrics.name: franken_node_mcp_tool_invocations_total
metrics.description: MCP tool invocations by tool and verdict.

event_codes.name: ltv_anchor_dual_signed
event_codes.description: Critical evidence anchor dual-signed under active suites.

event_codes.name: ltv_root_reattested
event_codes.description: MMR root re-attested under a currently valid suite.

error_codes.name: ltv_anteriority_unproven
error_codes.description: Verifier could not prove anteriority for the requested time.

metrics.name: franken_node_ltv_reattestations_total
metrics.description: Long-term-verifiability root re-attestations by suite and verdict.

event_codes.name: fleetlog_action_appended
event_codes.description: Fleet action appended to a node MMR action log.

event_codes.name: fleetlog_quorum_certified
event_codes.description: Fleet action received a k-of-n quorum certificate.

error_codes.name: fleetlog_equivocation_proven
error_codes.description: Conflicting signed actions proved node equivocation.

metrics.name: franken_node_fleetlog_quorum_certificates_total
metrics.description: Fleet-log quorum certificates by action and verdict.

event_codes.name: resolver_candidate_scored
event_codes.description: Package version candidate scored by trust and compatibility policy.

event_codes.name: resolver_admission_decided
event_codes.description: Resolver emitted an admission decision receipt.

error_codes.name: resolver_candidate_quarantined
error_codes.description: Candidate satisfies semver but is blocked by risk or trust policy.

metrics.name: franken_node_resolver_admission_decisions_total
metrics.description: Resolver admission decisions by decision and reason.

event_codes.name: corpus_record_loaded
event_codes.description: TNR labeled corpus record loaded from canonical storage.

event_codes.name: corpus_hash_verified
event_codes.description: Corpus hash verified before use by calibration or tests.

error_codes.name: corpus_hash_mismatch
error_codes.description: Corpus bytes did not match the expected canonical hash.

metrics.name: franken_node_corpus_records_total
metrics.description: Corpus records loaded by profile and verdict.

event_codes.name: calibration_run_started
event_codes.description: Calibration run started from a pinned corpus hash.

event_codes.name: calibration_artifact_signed
event_codes.description: Calibration artifact signed and made available for SDK recompute.

error_codes.name: calibration_recompute_mismatch
error_codes.description: Verifier SDK recompute did not match the signed calibration artifact.

metrics.name: franken_node_calibration_runs_total
metrics.description: Calibration runs by profile and verdict.
